full_text:
Zhang Hua (Maoxian) 張華 (茂先)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Hua (張華), styledMaoxian (茂先), was born in Fangcheng. Played Go with Sima Yan, approved invasion of Wu. Talented poet, became Prime Minister. Zhang Hua was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Jin Dynasty. Zhang Hua lived during the Three Kingdoms and Jin Dynasty periods of Chinese history.

Comprehensive Biography for Zhang Hua

BiographySource Undefined
Zhang Hua was a prominent minister who served Cao Wei, then the Jin dynasty. He came from a poor family, and in his hometown, he was virtually unknown to everyone except Lu Qin 盧欽.[SGZ 22]
